title: Jaliscoa goldmannii
taxonomy: Jaliscoa goldmannii is a species of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae. It belongs to the genus Jaliscoa and is native to Mexico. Jaliscoa goldmannii is classified as a perennial plant, which means it regrows every year. The classification of Jaliscoa goldmannii also includes its binomial nomenclature, which is used to identify the species scientifically. This classification is a crucial aspect of understanding the plant's characteristics and its position within the botanical hierarchy.
